channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bandits Attempt Kidnap in Eruku, Kwara; Local Security Repels Attack
item.description: Early Friday morning, residents of Eruku community for Ekiti Local Government Area, Kwara State, were shaken as heavily armed bandits stormed their village around 5 a.m. According to locals, the attac...

item.title: Shaina Nitura leads Adamson University to clean sweep over UST in UAAP volleyball
item.description: In a dominant UAAP Season 88 volleyball match, Shaina Nitura showcased exceptional skills, leading the Adamson Lady Falcons to a straight-set victory against the UST Golden Tigresses. Nitura's perform...

item.title: Seven People Including Child Killed, Eight Injured in Road Collision on Makran Coastal Highway Due to Abandoned Gas Tanker
item.description: In a tragic road accident at Manjhi on the Makran Coastal Highway in Balochistan, at least seven people, including a young child, lost their lives while eight others sustained injuries. According to p...

item.title: Mercedes dominate Australian GP qualifying as Piastri starts fifth
item.description: During qualifying for the 2026 Australian Grand Prix at Albert Park, Mercedes finally showed their true pace, with George Russell taking pole position and teammate Kimi Antonelli securing second despi...

item.title: Aatma Manthan Museum: Immersive Meditative Space Designed by Sanjay Puri Architects Wins Award
item.description: The Aatma Manthan Museum, situated at the base of the Statue of Belief in Nathdwara, Rajasthan, offers a unique meditative and sensorial experience. Designed by Mumbai-based Sanjay Puri Architects on ...

item.title: Nairobi Businessman Challenges Landlord Over Alleged Rent Arrears
item.description: In Nairobi, a local businessman, John Kunyiha, is taking legal action to stop his landlord and appointed auctioneers from seizing his property due to what he claims are disputed rent arrears. Kunyiha,...

item.title: 47 PTI Leaders Convicted for Organising May 9 Riots, Sentenced to 10 Years
item.description: An Anti-Terrorism Court (ATC) in Rawalpindi on Saturday convicted 47 individuals, including prominent PTI leaders such as Omar Ayub, Zartaj Gul, Murad Saeed, Shibli Faraz, Shehbaz Gill, and Hammad Azh...

item.title: Sydney Sweeney promotes her SYRN lingerie collection on Instagram
item.description: Sydney Sweeney, the 28-year-old actress and entrepreneur, recently promoted her lingerie brand SYRN on Instagram, showcasing pieces from both the Lowdown Cami and Deep Dive Low Scoop Bralette lines. I...

item.title: Eastern Cape Farmers and Communities Embrace Agroecology for Sustainable Food Systems
item.description: On 26 February 2026, Phawu Agri Park in Mazikhanye Location hosted a significant Agroecology Awareness Day, bringing together over 400 participants including farmers, youth, community members, and ins...

item.title: Daily Horoscope and Astrological Guidance for March 7, 2026
item.description: The Globe and Mail presents the daily horoscope for March 7, 2026, offering guidance for each zodiac sign. Individuals with birthdays today are encouraged to explore their imagination, which may lead ...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli escapes unharmed after heavy crash in Australian Grand Prix practice
item.description: Kimi Antonelli, the 19-year-old Mercedes driver, was involved in a significant incident during practice for the Australian Grand Prix at Albert Park. The Italian teenager lost control of his car at tu...

item.title: Louis Theroux discusses the manosphere, his documentaries, and personal reflections
item.description: Louis Theroux, renowned British documentary-maker, discusses his latest Netflix release, Inside the Manosphere, exploring extreme misogyny, male power structures, and internet culture. The documentary...

item.title: Impact of Male Rape Myths on Justice for Victims
item.description: New research shows that male rape myths strongly affect how jurors reach verdicts in male-on-male rape cases. These myths are misleading ideas about sexual violence, such as beliefs that 'real men' sh...

item.title: WHO Approves New HIV Prevention Drug Lenacapavir for Nine African Countries
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) don yan say dem don support nine countries to start to dey give Lenacapavir, one new long-acting HIV prevention medicine. Dis drug dey target people wey get high ri...

item.title: Geita Region to Host 2026 National International Women’s Day Events
item.description: Geita Region is set to host this year’s national International Women’s Day celebrations on March 8. The event will focus on empowering women and tackling Gender Based Violence (GBV) through community ...

item.title: Investigation Reveals Ukrainian Capital Being Illegally Moved Through Austria and Hungary
item.description: Between 2024 and 2025, authorities in Hungary uncovered a complex network facilitating the illegal transfer of Ukrainian capital through Austria and Hungary. This operation involved fraudulent call ce...

item.title: NSW Nightlife Captured in Photography Exhibition
item.description: A new photography exhibition commissioned by the New South Wales night-time economy office and hosted at Sydney’s Powerhouse Museum explores the state after dark. Featuring work by photographers Andre...

item.title: Mark Carney supports removing Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor from UK royal line of succession over Epstein links
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has publicly supported the removal of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, formerly known as Prince Andrew, from the British royal line of succession. Speaking to reporters ...

item.title: East African universities promote research-based startups for economic growth
item.description: Universities from across East Africa dey try find ways to turn research and academic knowledge into real-life startup businesses. This one dey happen during three-day Faculty Exchange Programme wey ha...

item.title: President Marcos Reappoints Sabuddin Abdurahim as Secretary of the National Commission on Muslim Filipinos for Another Two-Year Term
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. administered the oath of office to Sabuddin Abdurahim on Friday at the Malacañang Palace, officially reappointing him as Secretary of the National Commission ...
